gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言，编织一场跨越生死的浪漫奇遇。
gems.whyWatchEn: A wrong-number voicemail sparks an unlikely long-distance romance, blending grief, humor, and serendipity in a refreshingly original love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢《电子情书》式现代浪漫、接受轻奇幻设定、对死亡议题有柔软共鸣的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of modern epistolary romance like 'You've Got Mail', viewers open to light magical realism, and those who appreciate tender explorations of loss.

gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 经典史诗的新锐演绎，视觉壮阔却不止于宏大。
gems.whyWatchEn: A bold, visceral retelling of the Odyssey that strips away mythic gloss to focus on the raw, human cost of a warrior's homecoming.
gems.audience: 渴望硬核冒险、不惧黑暗叙事、期待经典故事被赋予当代思考的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Viewers craving gritty adventure, fans of dark mythological retellings, and those who want classic stories re-examined with modern depth.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 玩具们的数码生存战，笑中带泪的童年挽歌。
gems.whyWatchEn: The beloved toys face their most existential threat yet: digital distraction. A surprisingly poignant and clever commentary on childhood in the screen age.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》系列老粉、关心当代儿童娱乐变迁的家长、喜欢温情喜剧的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Longtime Toy Story fans, parents reflecting on modern childhood, and anyone who enjoys heartfelt comedies with a touch of social commentary.
